title: [codereview-P1] Yggdrasil address derivation not tested in cross-mesh context in gateway tests
description: Existing tests in lichen-gateway use only link-local. Add test for 02xx addresses in is_local_mesh to cover cross-mesh routing decision. Per spec/05-routing.md. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed by added unit test for yggdrasil routing in gateway.rs:197 and 3 review passes with no further P0-P2 findings. Test passes with cargo test.
